DESCRIPTION: Posting a valid mock user's email/password plus a fresh csrf token to the credentials callback redirects (302), indicating a successful login.
NAME: credentials callback authenticates a valid mock user

DESCRIPTION: Posting the wrong password to the credentials callback redirects back with an "error" query param instead of authenticating.
NAME: credentials callback rejects an invalid password

DESCRIPTION: The csrf endpoint always returns a non-empty token, required to authenticate the credentials callback.
NAME: GET /api/auth/csrf returns a csrf token

DESCRIPTION: An unauthenticated request to the session endpoint returns a null session, not an error.
NAME: GET /api/auth/session returns null when unauthenticated
